name: Micro-Air ConnectRV

excel.source: /Users/sdas/Micro-Air/Micro Air  End to End QA Pla.xlsx

appMap:
graph TD
    START["🔴 Welcome Screen"] -->|Sign In| LOGIN["Login Form"]
    START -->|Create Account| CREATE["Create Account Form"]
    START -->|Forgot Password| FORGOT["Forgot Password"]

    LOGIN -->|Valid Credentials| HOME["🏠 Hub Home Dashboard"]
    CREATE -->|Submit| MFA["Security Code / MFA"]
    MFA -->|Enter OTP| ONBOARD["Onboarding"]
    ONBOARD -->|Skip/Complete| HOME

    HOME -->|Tab: Notifications| NOTIF["🔔 Alerts List"]
    HOME -->|Tab: Support| SUPPORT["🎧 Support Links"]
    HOME -->|Tab: Account| ACCOUNT["👤 Account Profile"]
    HOME -->|Tap +| ADD_HUB["Add Hub Flow"]
    HOME -->|Tap Hub ⋮| HUB_MENU{"Hub Menu"}
    HOME -->|Tap Sensor| SENSOR_DETAIL["Sensor Detail"]

    HUB_MENU -->|Rename Hub| RENAME_HUB["Rename Hub Form"]
    HUB_MENU -->|Alert Settings| HUB_ALERTS["Hub Alert Settings"]
    HUB_MENU -->|Change WiFi| WIFI["WiFi Network List"]
    HUB_MENU -->|Add Sensor| ADD_SENSOR["Add Sensor Flow"]
    HUB_MENU -->|Remove| DELETE_HUB["Confirm Delete Hub"]

    SENSOR_DETAIL -->|Tap ⋮| SENSOR_MENU{"Sensor Menu"}
    SENSOR_MENU -->|Alert Settings| SENSOR_ALERTS["Sensor Thresholds"]
    SENSOR_MENU -->|Rename| RENAME_SENSOR["Rename Sensor"]
    SENSOR_MENU -->|Remove| DELETE_SENSOR["Confirm Delete Sensor"]

    NOTIF -->|Tap ⚙| ALERT_SETTINGS["Alert Settings"]
    ALERT_SETTINGS -->|Per-Hub| HUB_ALERTS
    ALERT_SETTINGS -->|Per-Sensor| SENSOR_ALERTS

    ACCOUNT -->|Edit ✏| EDIT_PROFILE["Edit Profile Form"]
    ACCOUNT -->|Change Password| CHANGE_PW["Send OTP → New Password"]
    ACCOUNT -->|Log Out| START
    ACCOUNT -->|Delete Account| DELETE_ACCT["Confirm Delete Account"]

    ADD_HUB -->|Pair| PAIR["Scanning for Hub"]
    PAIR -->|Found| WIFI_SETUP["Select WiFi Network"]
    WIFI_SETUP -->|Connected| FW_UPDATE["Firmware Update"]
    FW_UPDATE -->|Complete| CUSTOMIZE["Customize Hub"]
    CUSTOMIZE -->|Save| HOME

    SUPPORT -->|Knowledge Bank| EXT1["External: Knowledge Bank"]
    SUPPORT -->|Contact Us| EXT2["External: Contact Us"]

    style HOME fill:#34D399,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style LOGIN fill:#34D399,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style CREATE fill:#34D399,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style NOTIF fill:#34D399,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style ACCOUNT fill:#34D399,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style SENSOR_DETAIL fill:#34D399,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style RENAME_HUB fill:#34D399,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style HUB_ALERTS fill:#34D399,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style ADD_HUB fill:#34D399,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style SUPPORT fill:#34D399,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style EDIT_PROFILE fill:#34D399,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style ADD_SENSOR fill:#34D399,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style RENAME_SENSOR fill:#34D399,stroke:#333,color:#000
